channel.title: Crypto-Assets on Archive 03
channel.description: Recent content in Crypto-Assets on Archive 03

item.title: Solana ($SOL): Is the 'Ethereum Killer' Ready for the Throne? 2026 Outlook
item.description: Solana ($SOL) is gaining traction as a true competitor to Ethereum thanks to low fees, high speeds, and surging DEX and stablecoin activity. We examine whether it’s a legitimate rival or just a high-beta altcoin.
